violations.text: The bathroom was observed to be missing floor-to-wall juncture/coving at the base of the wall. Coving is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
Wet mops were observed sitting in buckets in the backroom mop sink area and not allowed to properly air dry. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026
The hand-washing sink in the employee/customer bathroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were replaced at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

At the time of inspection, the beverage cooler where excess milk items are being stored was observed to have an accumulation of ice buildup on the fan unit. Per the PIC, a workorder ticket has been submitted for service. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces of retail refrigeration were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris... - The bottom area shelf of the milk storage coolers was observed to have a build-up of dried milk/debris Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
